name: DNA Replication (Leading and Lagging Strands)
description: DNA replication: helicase unwinds the origin, primase/polymerase synthesize the continuous leading strand and discontinuous Okazaki fragments on the lagging strand, which are matured and ligated as the fork advances.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Origin of replication"]
    N2["Helicase unwinds duplex"]
    N3["Primase makes RNA primer"]
    N4["Pol extends leading strand"]
    N5["Lagging: Okazaki fragments"]
    N6["Primers removed; gaps filled"]
    N7["Ligase seals nicks"]
    N8{"Fork continues?"}
    N9["Two daughter duplexes"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N3 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N4 --> N8
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|continue| N2
    N8 -->|done| N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Primase makes RNA primer
nodeDetails.detail: SSB coats ssDNA; primer laid down

nodeDetails.label: Lagging: Okazaki fragments
nodeDetails.detail: Discontinuous synthesis on the lagging strand

nodeDetails.label: Ligase seals nicks
nodeDetails.detail: Fragments joined into a continuous strand

flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Principles and concepts of DNA replication in bacteria, archaea, and eukarya
sources.authors: O'Donnell, M.; Langston, L.; Stillman, B.

sources.title: Molecular Biology of the Cell (DNA Replication Mechanisms)
